summary: Full testing of start_time and end_time fields feature. All 6 features verified working correctly across backend API, desktop UI, and mobile UI.
passed_tests: Feature 1: Event edit form shows start_time and end_time fields (desktop) - verified with 'початок' (start) and 'кінець' (end) labels
Feature 2: Event edit form shows start_time and end_time fields (mobile) - verified with same labels
Feature 3: Manual event creation shows start_time and end_time fields - verified in 'заповнити вручну' mode
Feature 4: Auto-fill end_time when start_time changes - verified 15:00 + 3 hours = 18:00
Feature 5: End_time is still editable after auto-fill - verified can change to custom time
Feature 6: Settings page shows sync column with Google Calendar - verified 'синхронізація' tab with Google Calendar integration
seed_data_creation: Created test events with time fields during backend testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: start_time and end_time fields fully implemented. Edit form shows both fields under labels 'початок' and 'кінець'. Auto-fill logic: when start_time changes, end_time auto-sets to start_time + 3 hours (using handleStartTimeChange function). Manual event creation uses same updateParsedEvent function with same auto-fill logic. Backend models EventCreate, EventUpdate, Event, and ParsedEvent all include start_time/end_time as optional string fields (default ''). AI parsing prompt updated to extract time, but LLM may not always extract it from text - this is expected behavior. Settings page has 3 tabs: нагадування (reminders), smm, синхронізація (sync) - sync tab shows Google Calendar with connect/disconnect functionality.
